title: Device Performance
description: CPU, memory, disk metrics per device over time

list.name: device
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT device_name FROM performance_latest FINAL WHERE device_name != '' ORDER BY device_name

list.name: component_type
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT component_type FROM performance WHERE device_name IN ($device) AND component_type != '' ORDER BY component_type

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeInterval(executed_at) AS time, device_name, component, avg(metric_values[indexOf(metric_names, 'utilization_pct')]) AS utilization FROM performance WHERE device_name IN ($device) AND component_type = 'cpu' AND $__timeFilter(executed_at) GROUP BY time, device_name, component ORDER BY time

SELECT $__timeInterval(executed_at) AS time, device_name, avg(metric_values[indexOf(metric_names, 'utilization_pct')]) AS utilization FROM performance WHERE device_name IN ($device) AND component_type = 'memory' AND $__timeFilter(executed_at) GROUP BY time, device_name ORDER BY time

SELECT $__timeInterval(executed_at) AS time, device_name, component, avg(metric_values[indexOf(metric_names, 'utilization_pct')]) AS utilization FROM performance WHERE device_name IN ($device) AND component_type = 'disk' AND $__timeFilter(executed_at) GROUP BY time, device_name, component ORDER BY time

SELECT device_name, component_type, component, metric_names, metric_values, executed_at FROM performance_latest FINAL WHERE device_name IN ($device) AND device_id != toUUID('00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000') ORDER BY device_name, component_type, component
